case_title: SOHEE LACEY ET AL VS. AMANDA CREAN PHOTOGRAPHERS

docket_entries.description: EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED SEP-01-2021 ORDERED DESTROYED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT AMANDA CREAN PHOTOGRAPHERS (AMANDA CREAN)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-17-2021 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-17-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-17-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF SOHEE LACEY IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF MATTHEW MCCONAGHY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AMANDA CREAN PHOTOGRAPHERS IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY AMANDA CREAN, OWNER. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LACEY, SOHEE MCCONAGHY, MATTHEW IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT AMANDA CREAN PHOTOGRAPHERS (AMANDA CREAN) PLAINTIFFS HAVE A CREDIT OF $7050 FOR PHOTOGRAPHY SERVICES FOR PERSONAL USE OR THE CREDIT CAN BE GIFTED ONE TIME BY PLAINTIFF TO ANOTHER PERSON FOR PHOTOGRAPHY SERVICES. NO COSTS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,050.00 FILED BY LACEY, SOHEE MCCONAGHY, MATTHEW AS TO DEFENDANT AMANDA CREAN PHOTOGRAPHERS (AMANDA CREAN) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-17-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
